paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.33 as of 2026-07-23, representing a decrease of 3.88% from the prior close and 27.22% over the last 22 trading sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

A recent news headline from PR Newswire on 2026-07-23 is "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights". This news item is related to the company's admission of shares of common stock.

There are 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form on 2026-07-21 regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on 2026-07-15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
